summary: We are looking for an AI Engineer to design, build, and deploy production-grade AI systems including LLM-powered applications, RAG pipelines, and ML models. You will work closely with product, data science, and infrastructure teams to ship reliable, scalable AI features.
education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Mathematics, or equivalent experience
responsibilities: Design and build LLM-powered features and pipelines (RAG, agents, function-calling)
Evaluate, fine-tune, and deploy open-source and proprietary models
Build and maintain ML infrastructure and monitoring
Collaborate with product and design on AI-driven user experiences
Write clean, tested, production-quality Python code
Document systems and contribute to the team's AI knowledge base
